entities.description: The soil-test crop response precision model used to determine P doses

entities.description: A conceptual approach used to determine nutrient application based on desired yield

entities.name: NUTRIENT MOBILIZATION
entities.description: The process of making nutrients available for plant uptake

entities.description: The changes and movements of nutrients within the soil-plant system
